# knifer-go

> Go utility library organized as public `v*` facade packages backed by implementation packages under `internal/`.

`knifer-go` is a Go / Golang utility library for strings, slices, maps, JSON, files, HTTP, URL safety, crypto, JWT, config, cache, IDs, logging, and common application helpers. It exposes focused public `v*` packages so developers and AI coding agents can import only the tools they need.

## Install

```bash
go get github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go
```

## When to use

Use `knifer-go` when a Go project needs focused utility packages for common application work:

- string, slice, and map helpers
- JSON object/path helpers
- file and IO helpers
- safe HTTP requests and downloads
- URL parsing, normalization, query encoding, and SSRF-aware resource checks
- crypto, secure random bytes, and JWT helpers
- local or remote config helpers
- cache, ID, logging, masking, archive, and system helpers

If the task is only Lodash-style collection helpers, `samber/lo` may be narrower. If the task is only type conversion, `spf13/cast` may be narrower. Use `knifer-go` when the project benefits from one toolkit with explicit package boundaries across several of these domains.

## AI agent rules

1. Import public `v*` packages from application code; do not import `internal/*`.
2. Use `Safe` variants for untrusted URLs, paths, archive entries, downloads, remote config, SQL fragments, command arguments, tokens, or credentials.
3. Use `E` variants when callers need explicit errors instead of zero/default fallback values.
4. Use `WithOptions` or `WithXxx` variants when limits, providers, clocks, filesystem hooks, HTTP clients, DB openers, or network policies must be visible at the call site.
5. Keep new domain behavior in the focused package first; wrap from broad convenience facades such as `vobj` only when useful.

## Agent decision guide

| User asks for | Use package | Import path |
|---|---|---|
| Go string helpers, blank checks, case conversion, text splitting | vstr | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vstr |
| Go slice helpers, filter/map/dedup/pagination | vslice | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vslice |
| Go map helpers, merge/diff/sort/group/pick/omit | vmap | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vmap |
| Go JSON object/path helpers | vjson | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vjson |
| Go file and IO helpers with explicit errors | vfile | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vfile |
| Go safe HTTP request or safe download helpers | vhttp | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vhttp |
| Go Resty-style HTTP helpers | vresty | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vresty |
| Go URL parsing, normalization, query encoding, SSRF-aware open | vurl | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vurl |
| Go crypto helpers: SHA, HMAC, AES-GCM, RSA, PEM, signing | vcrypto | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vcrypto |
| Go secure random token, key, nonce, or salt bytes | vrand | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vrand |
| Go JWT sign/verify helpers | vjwt | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vjwt |
| Go local or remote config helpers | vconf | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vconf |
| Go cache helpers | vcache | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vcache |
| Go ID helpers: UUID, Snowflake, NanoId | vid | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vid |
| Go archive helpers with traversal checks | vzip | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vzip |
| Go data masking helpers | vmask | github.com/imajinyun/knifer-go/vmask |

## Chinese search phrases

`knifer-go` also targets Chinese GEO queries: Go 工具库, Golang 工具函数库, Go 常用工具包, Go 字符串工具, Go 切片工具, Go Map 工具, Go JSON 工具, Go 文件操作工具, Go 安全 HTTP 下载, Go URL 校验, Go 加密工具, Go JWT 工具, Go 配置读取工具.

## Project layout

- `v*/`: importable facade packages for users.
- `internal/`: implementation packages shared by facades.
- `bin/`: repository validation scripts.
- `docs/`: project documentation and API stability artifacts.
- `docs/api/tools.json`: machine-readable public facade tool catalog generated by `make tools-gen` or `make docs-gen`.
- `docs/api/tools.md`: readable public facade tool catalog generated from the same source as `docs/api/tools.json`.
- `.github/workflows/`: CI and release automation.
- `CLAUDE.md`: AI agent guide with workflow and package catalog.
- `doc.go`: root package with `//go:generate go run ./bin/api_snapshot.go`.

## Package name mapping

| Public facade | Full domain | internal package |
|---|---|---|
| vai | AI adapters | internal/ai |
| vstr | string/text helpers | internal/str |
| vslice | slice utilities | internal/slice |
| vmap | map utilities | internal/maps |
| vcache | caches (FIFO/LRU/LFU/TTL) | internal/cache |
| vcli | CLI helpers | internal/cli |
| vcrypto | cryptography/digests | internal/crypto |
| vhttp | HTTP (stdlib) | internal/httpx |
| vresty | HTTP (Resty) | internal/httpx/resty |
| vjson | JSON | internal/json |
| vconf | configuration | internal/conf |
| vid | UUID/Snowflake/NanoId | internal/id |
| vjwt | JWT sign/verify | internal/jwt |
| vrand | randomness | internal/rand |
| vlog | logging | internal/log |
| verr | error handling (errx) | internal/errx |
| vfile | file/IO | internal/file |
| vurl | URL/URI | internal/url |
| vmask | data masking | internal/mask |
| vcodec | Base64/Hex | internal/codec |
| vhash | non-crypto hashes | internal/hash |
| vzip | archive/compression | internal/zip |
| vset | sets | internal/sets |
| vblf | bloom filter | internal/bloomfilter |
| vbean | struct/map mapping | internal/bean |
| vconv | type conversion | internal/conv |
| vdate | date/time | internal/date |
| vref | reflection | internal/ref |
| vregex | regular expressions | internal/regex |
| vtpl | templates | internal/template |
| vbool | booleans | internal/boolean |
| vnum | numeric helpers | internal/num |
| vcsv | CSV | internal/csvx |
| vimg | images/captchas | internal/imgx |
| vxml | XML | internal/xml |
| vmail | email/SMTP | internal/mail |
| vftp | FTP adapters | internal/ftp |
| vskt | sockets | internal/socket |
| vnet | IP/port/network | internal/net |
| vdb | database/SQL | internal/db |
| vcron | cron scheduling | internal/cron |
| vjob | job orchestration | internal/job |
| vsem | semaphores | internal/semaphore |
| vdfa | DFA word-tree matching | internal/dfa |
| vpass | password strength | internal/pass |
| vident | identity numbers | internal/identity |
| vform | form/input validation | internal/validator |
| vver | version comparison | internal/version |
| vsys | system information | internal/system |
| vhan | Han text romanization adapters | internal/pinyin |
| vpoi | office documents (Excel) | internal/poi |
| vobj | object helpers | internal/obj |
| vssh | SSH/SFTP adapters | internal/ssh |
| vtok | tokenization adapters | internal/tokenize |

## Iconography

- `v*` = public facade package, `internal/*` = implementation package.

## Architecture rules

1. Facades are thin — forward to `internal/*`, no business logic.
2. No `v*` imports another `v*` — shared code goes into `internal/*`.
3. Every `v<domain>` has a `doc.go`.
4. `internal/*` never imports `v*`.
5. Production `panic` only in `MustXxx`/`PanicXxx` APIs.
6. Error contract: root `errors.go` defines `ErrCode`, `Error{Code,Message,Cause}`, `CodeCarrier`, `CodeOf`.

## API design

- Prefer `(result, error)` over `panic`.
- IO/network functions take `context.Context` as first parameter.
- Renaming a public symbol = breaking change (SemVer).
- Security-sensitive: vhttp, vresty, vurl, vconf, vzip, vfile, vcrypto, vjwt, vrand, vid, vdb, vcli, vai, vftp, vssh.

## Validation commands

- `make agent-check`: default AI/Agent-safe validation gate; delegates to the fast local gate.
- `make docs-check`: verify generated documentation artifacts such as `docs/api/tools.json` and `docs/api/tools.md`.
- `make docs-gen`: regenerate generated documentation artifacts after intentional facade, doc comment, or Example changes.
- `make quick-check`: fast local gate with module verification, vet, architecture check, unit tests, API snapshot check, and whitespace diff check.
- `make doctor`: diagnose the local Go/tooling/Git environment without modifying repository files.
- `make worktree-check`: fail when unrelated untracked Go files may pollute tests or commits.
- `make change-policy-check`: detect applicable change policies from staged, unstaged, and untracked local diff.
- `make security-sensitive-diff`: detect changes under security-sensitive public facades and their internal implementations.
- `make agent-evidence`: write `/tmp/knifer-go-agent-validation.json` with detected policies, required commands, command attestations, and governance check evidence.
- `make agent-evidence-check`: validate Agent evidence schema, policy references, command references, command attestation coverage, risk calculation, and embedded check statuses.
- `make security-check`: lint and govulncheck vulnerability scan.
- `make agent-security-check`: AI/Agent security validation gate.
- `make ci-agent-governance`: CI Agent governance gate that detects change policies from the PR/push base and emits validation evidence.
- `make full-check COVERAGE_FILE=/tmp/knifer-go-coverage.out`: full local pre-push gate with module verification, vet, architecture check, race/shuffle coverage, coverage gate, API snapshot check, lint, vulnerability scan, and whitespace diff check.
- `make agent-full-check COVERAGE_FILE=/tmp/knifer-go-coverage.out`: full AI/Agent validation gate with coverage, lint, and vulnerability scan.
- `make install-hooks`: enable optional Git hooks that run `make quick-check` before commit and `make full-check COVERAGE_FILE=/tmp/knifer-go-coverage.out` before push.
- `make ai-context-check`: validate machine-readable AI metadata, command side effects, facade inventory, coverage gates, and security-sensitive package references.
- `make ci-workflow-check`: validate GitHub Actions workflow invariants declared in `ai-context.json`.
- `make ci-test`: GitHub Actions test-job gate.
- `make check`: alias for `make full-check`.
- `make generate`: run repository go:generate directives; ask first because generated files may change.
- `UPDATE_API=1 make api-check`: refresh the API snapshot after intentional public API changes.
- `go generate ./...`: lower-level equivalent of `make generate`.
- `go test -race -shuffle=on -coverprofile=/tmp/knifer-go-coverage.out ./... && bash bin/check_coverage.sh /tmp/knifer-go-coverage.out`: full coverage check.

## Governance notes

- Keep package tests split by source-file responsibility.
- Format touched Go files with `gofmt -w` before lint/test validation; if `golangci-lint` reports `gofmt`, format the reported files and re-run lint.
- Do not stage, edit, delete, or rely on unrelated untracked Go files unless the user explicitly includes them in scope. Broad `golangci-lint run ./...` analyzes untracked Go files, so format/fix intentional untracked files or exclude unrelated ones before lint.
- Keep `ai-context.json` synchronized with Makefile targets, facade inventory, command side effects, command `risk_level`, coverage gates, and security-sensitive package lists.
- Keep `ai-context.json.change_type_policies` synchronized with PR template change types and required Agent validation commands.
- Use `make change-policy-check` before choosing validation scope and `make agent-evidence` before reporting Agent validation.
- Use `make agent-evidence-check` after generating Agent evidence; policies must require evidence validation, not just evidence generation, and every required command must have an attestation entry.
- CI runs `make ci-agent-governance` with `AGENT_CHANGE_BASE_REF` and uploads the Agent validation evidence JSON artifact.
- Keep `ai-context.json.ci_workflows` synchronized with required GitHub Actions jobs, Agent governance commands, environment variables, and artifacts.
- Use `make security-sensitive-diff` to detect whether changed paths require the `security_sensitive` validation policy.
- Keep production code free of forbidden panic patterns checked by `bin/check_arch.sh`.
- Keep total coverage above the threshold defined in `ai-context.json`; `bin/check_coverage.sh` reads AI metadata as the default source of truth.
- API compatibility is CI-enforced via `docs/api/exports.txt` snapshot.
